tools.name: check_obligations
tools.description: Given an AI agent use case and optional jurisdiction, returns all applicable regulatory obligations with evidence requirements, enforcement dates, and penalty information. Use this to understand what compliance requirements apply to a specific type of AI agent.

tools.name: get_regulation_articles
tools.description: Returns structured, machine-readable regulation details including specific articles, obligation classifications, risk levels, and evidence requirements. Use this to understand the detailed requirements of a specific regulation.

tools.name: check_deadline
tools.description: Returns upcoming and recent compliance deadlines with enforcement dates, penalty information, and related obligations. Use this to understand time-sensitive compliance requirements.

tools.name: compare_jurisdictions
tools.description: Side-by-side comparison of regulatory obligations across jurisdictions for a given compliance category. Shows equivalent, overlapping, stricter, and weaker mappings between regulations. Use this to understand how requirements differ across borders.
